# KUUS DESIGN — llms.txt
# Premium Basebeton Microcement Studio, Tartu, Estonia
# https://kuusdesign.ee

## About
KUUS DESIGN is a premium Basebeton microcement studio based in Tartu, Estonia. We supply and install handcrafted Basebeton mineral surfaces for luxury residential and commercial interiors. Authorised installer of Basebeton by Stone Age (Netherlands) — EC1 Plus certified microcement systems.

## What We Do
- Basebeton microcement flooring (seamless, over existing tiles, underfloor heating compatible)
- Basebeton microcement bathrooms (waterproof, zero-demolition renovation)
- Basebeton microcement walls and feature surfaces
- Oxidestuc metallic wall finishes (Gold, Bronze, Copper, Aluminium, Rust, Steel)
- Natureplast natural clay plaster (vapour-permeable, healthy indoor climate)
- Mineral furniture and custom objects
- Professional Basebeton installation training and certification (Tartu studio)

## Product Range (Basebeton by Stone Age)
- Basebeton Originale — ready-to-use all-rounder, 75 colours, floors/walls/furniture
- Beton Ciré Originale — elegant concrete look, 41 colours, floors/walls/worktops
- Oxidestuc — metallic finish, 6 metallic colours (Gold/Bronze/Copper/Aluminium/Rust/Steel)
- Natureplast — natural clay plaster, 16 colours, dry rooms only
- Sichtbeton — raw concrete look, 3 grey shades, walls
- Basebeton Paint — concrete-look paint, 40 colours
- Basebeton Plus — one-pot system, 64 colours, floors/walls/furniture
- Basebeton Xtreme — heavy-duty epoxy floor, 64 colours
- Basebeton Solid — strongest floor plaster, 22+64 colours
- Basebeton Grit — textured floor, 20 colours
- Stuccopuro — decorative wall plaster, 60 colours

## Colour Palette
366 colours across 11 product-specific collections. All colours specified by factory code.
Full palette: https://kuusdesign.ee/et/colors

## Service Area
Tartu, Estonia. Available for projects across Estonia and the EU.

## Contact
Email: studio@kuusdesign.ee
Phone: +372 555 124 12
Address: Mineral tn 124, Tartu 51003, Estonia
Studio hours: Mon–Fri 09:00–18:00

## Languages
Estonian (et) — primary, English (en), German (de), Russian (ru), Spanish (es), French (fr)

## Brand
Est. 2024. Studio philosophy: quiet luxury through material honesty. Every surface is hand-troweled by certified artisans using professional Basebeton microcement systems.
